titulo: Plans come from Codeplex. The service comes from DGD.
descripcion: Software licenses are contracted from Codeplex's official list. We add implementation, training and local support in Peru.
nota: // Prices from Codeplex Software's official list. DGD quotes implementation separately.

servicios.titulo: What we add on top of your Codeplex license
servicios.descripcion: You contract the software license directly on Codeplex's official plan. DGD makes sure it works in your company with these packages.

items.name: Essential Onboarding
items.desc: Installation, base parametrization and 2 live training sessions. Ideal if your data is already clean.

items.name: Full Implementation
items.desc: Historical data migration, module integration and 60 days of accompaniment.

items.name: Annual Support
items.desc: Priority support, quarterly training and process review all year.

cta.titulo: Need help choosing the right plan?
cta.descripcion: A DGD consultant helps you pick the Codeplex plan that fits your volume and the implementation service you need.
